title: Invigorating Light British Ovoli Mushroom Pasta
description: A rich and light British dish featuring ovoli mushrooms, pasta, and a water emulsion, made in an iron teppan for an energizing meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the iron teppan over medium heat.
Add the sliced ovoli mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced.
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until it is al dente.
Add the cooked pasta to the teppan and toss it with the mushroom mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top it with grated parmesan and chopped parsley.
